ShortDescription.Value: Fixes Signature phantom vacancy and provides diagnostic tooling for software-track office-demand investigation.

Publish.LongDescription:
No Office Demand Fix targets two known causes behind stalled office demand in Cities: Skylines II.
- Phantom Vacancy fix: removes stale PropertyOnMarket and PropertyToBeOnMarket state from occupied Signature office and industrial properties, preventing false free-space counts from suppressing demand. - Software track: includes an optional office-resource trade patch plus diagnostics for a separate software buyer-state and resource-flow investigation.
Current release status:
- fixes the confirmed Signature Phantom Vacancy case - keeps non-signature Phantom Vacancy cases under diagnostics - keeps the software path available as comparison tooling, not a claimed full fix - current same-save current-build evidence shows no clear immediate trade-patch mitigation through day 22
Publish.ChangeLog: - Added diagnostics for additional phantom vacancy cases outside Signature properties. - Added an optional mitigation for software-supply-related office efficiency collapse. - Clarified that the software path is still experimental.
